variants.title: RHR330N05V3 AB1
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR330N05V3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR330N05V3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Outer Diameter: 94.5 mm, Inner Diameter: 48.2 mm, Length: 194.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 3.0 BAR bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +100°C, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.0 BAR, Seal: Viton
